categories.label: 风格库
categories.description: 收集和蒸馏账号与媒介规则。

categories.label: 数据入口
categories.description: 归一化 Cuebook 数据并选择内容机会。

categories.label: 内容配方
categories.description: 保存用户选择、做法、口味与出餐配置。

categories.label: 证据检查
categories.description: 检查资产投射并选择分析路线。

categories.label: 研究编排
categories.description: 建立研究包并规划多渠道内容。

categories.label: 观点协议
categories.description: 把研究或最终内容编译成可验证、可结算、可追溯的交易观点。

categories.label: 内容制作
categories.description: 生成紧凑文字和多媒介内容包。

categories.label: 审批交付
categories.description: 冻结内容、审批和发布交接。

categories.label: 历史复盘
categories.description: 核对发布、纠错、互动和交易记录。

categories.label: 流程控制
categories.description: 生成 DAG、追踪工件和阻断状态。

categories.label: 产品入口
categories.description: 查询与创作两个稳定入口，以及两者之间的单向调用边界。

skills.description: Normalize an authorized public commentator corpus.

ui.summary: 清洗授权账号样本。

skills.description: Distill source, attention, reasoning, and expression rules from a corpus.

ui.summary: 建立可复用的账号观察与表达规则。

skills.description: Normalize authorized article, community, carousel, and video samples.

ui.summary: 清洗授权媒介样本。

skills.description: Distill reusable structural rules for articles, communities, carousels, and video.

ui.summary: 建立平台结构、节奏和素材规则。

skills.description: Normalize five Cuebook domains with provenance, time, permission, and privacy guards.

ui.summary: 冻结并清洗五类 Cuebook 数据。

skills.description: Resolve selected ingredients, analysis, voice, outputs, skills, and extensions into ContentRecipeV1.

ui.summary: 把选择保存成可复现的内容配方。

skills.description: Deduplicate, gate, classify, and prioritize content opportunities.

ui.summary: 合并重复材料并确定可研究主题。

skills.description: Validate source, asset, direction, directness, and freshness before research.

ui.summary: 阻止资产、方向和代理链错配。

skills.description: Classify event type, confidence, reasoning lenses, render shape, and abstention.

ui.summary: 选择分析路径并保留 abstention。

skills.description: Compile explicit creator support requests, then retrieve linked news, basis-compatible metrics, comparators, market context, countercase, and invalidation.

ui.summary: 把新闻、PR、估值和比较项逐项查齐并校准口径。

skills.description: Compile research or creator source material into source-faithful market-view meaning, ownership, posture, horizon, and resolution semantics.

ui.summary: 保留来源角色、观点归属、交易意图和结算明确度。

skills.description: Freeze Cuebook reasoning into a versioned, evidence-linked, resolvable trading thesis.

ui.summary: 冻结可验证、可结算的交易观点。

skills.description: Compile creator text or a selected commentator corpus item with verified evidence, mechanisms, countercases, metrics, scenarios, and settlement into one reusable visual argument graph.

ui.summary: 把叙事编译成可复用的事件、机制、反例与结算图谱。

skills.description: Expose the implicit trade inside a creator viewpoint as a reusable strategy family, catalyst, price mechanism, expression, horizon, edge, action line, reason line, and public tags while keeping evidence state private.

ui.summary: 自动识别事件驱动、传导机制、交易表达和时间窗口。

skills.description: Lock market meaning, authorship, three visual reader jobs, evidence shapes, exact Query tool bindings, Skill path, renderer route, and hashes into one shared expression plan.

ui.summary: 锁定含义、作者身份，以及必须补齐的新闻、数字和结算数据。

skills.description: Resolve intent-routed, source-linked market primitives and typed evidence objects while preserving exact Query tool provenance, evidence shape, route hash, and optional-only fallback.

ui.summary: 装配曲线、新闻簇、分布、扇形、资金流与收益结构；数据不够就不画。

skills.description: Execute locked fast-read, proof, and system jobs as structurally distinct HTML-native candidates using only their routed evidence shapes and data-gated financial grammars.

ui.summary: 同一交易逻辑生成快速判断、证据证明、系统演绎三种阅读入口，并按数据形态组合新闻、曲线、分布、情景、资金流与策略。

skills.description: Deterministically freeze the selected HTML-native layout, source bindings, palette, argument pattern, and nonblank raster hashes into an exact 2488 x 1056 Cuebook publication image plus 622 x 264 preview; retain 720 x 420 SVG only for legacy compatibility.

ui.summary: 选择或混合三套排版，并冻结为最终静态观点图。

skills.description: Deferred motion-direction capability retained outside the current static creator workflow.

ui.summary: 动画方向暂存；当前创作流程只生成静态观点图。

skills.description: Deferred motion-rendering capability retained outside the current static creator workflow.

ui.summary: 动画渲染暂存；当前版本不出现在创作者前端。

skills.description: Internal compatibility renderer for legacy causal-chain, metric-thesis, scenario-tree, evidence-balance, and comparison cards.

ui.summary: 为旧版逻辑卡调用保留兼容输出。

skills.description: Internal compatibility renderer for legacy data-led Feed figures.

ui.summary: 为旧版市场图调用保留兼容输出。

skills.description: Internal compatibility renderer for legacy single-signal Feed cards.

ui.summary: 为旧版市场信号调用保留兼容输出。

skills.description: Plan series, event lifecycles, master content, derivatives, and dependencies.

ui.summary: 生成主稿、衍生稿、系列或事件链。

skills.description: Render one compact post or batch-generate three meaning-locked, independently passed PostV1 siblings for direct selection.

ui.summary: 按选择的平台生成紧凑文字。

skills.description: Use the cached fast path to assemble one locked market view into three concise choices that preserve required linked evidence, basis-compatible metrics, and optional settlement semantics.

ui.summary: 生成三份短文案和观点图，并把关键新闻与数字链接一并交给前端。

skills.description: Compile fixed-deadline or trigger-activated, event-bounded market views into one primary settlement claim and deterministic one-line footer.

ui.summary: 正文完成后生成可结算观点与一行版。

skills.description: Compile a confirmed claim and DB-bound entry snapshot into one of four constrained, hash-frozen formula families, including equal-notional long/short pair settlement.

ui.summary: 把已确认的结算观点变成后端可执行、可审计的公式和状态机。

skills.description: Render articles, Reddit, Xiaohongshu carousels, and short-video packages.

ui.summary: 按媒介语法生成卡片、长文和视频包。

skills.description: Render sourced OHLC/K-line evidence with price levels, sealed/forming bars, aligned volume confirmation, open-ended triggers, or an explicit settlement clock.

ui.summary: 在紧凑观点图之外生成真实 K 线、长历史和结算时钟。

skills.description: Compute deterministic, sourced OHLCV indicators that test the selected viewpoint.

ui.summary: 计算强弱、趋势、波动和量价指标。

skills.description: Assemble the shared creator expression, compact text, unified viewpoint visual, optional settlement, and evidence into the product-native Cuebook card.

ui.summary: 把已验证模块装配成观点预览和 Feed 卡片。

skills.description: Freeze exact payloads, assets, settlement protocols, approvals, schedule, idempotency, and rollback data.

ui.summary: 冻结审批后的精确发布候选。

skills.description: Reconcile publication receipts, corrections, engagement, market calibration, and authorized trade outcomes.

ui.summary: 核对真实发布、纠错和结果记录。

skills.description: Resume from the latest valid artifact, separate semantic seed Query from intent-driven gap Query, and execute hash-locked text, visual, renderer, and settlement branches.

ui.summary: 先把观点里的新闻和数字需求查齐，再生成三份可追溯候选。

skills.description: Search, inspect, compare, and explain Cuebook data through one strictly read-only entrypoint.

ui.summary: 查看 Cuebook 数据、来源、比较与历史，不产生任何写入。

skills.description: Enter creation from the latest compatible artifact, verify semantic premises, then fill only the evidence gaps declared by the locked expression route.

ui.summary: 保留用户观点，必要时调用查询，再生成三套文字与观点图候选。

skills.description: Triage a fresh visitor, complete asset, direction, horizon, and optional price anchor through short follow-ups, verify against Cuebook, and hand back a confirmed viewpoint seed or route a pure lookup to query.

ui.summary: 分诊来访输入，补全并核验观点必要项，回传结构化种子。

presets.name: 跨平台交易内容
presets.description: 一份研究生成 X 与小红书等多个衍生内容。

presets.name: 盘中异动
presets.description: 解释价格异动、被迫行为和下一确认点。

presets.name: 财报前瞻
presets.description: 围绕预期、历史比较、关键变量和电话会确认点组织内容。

presets.name: 交易观察
presets.description: 围绕判断、时间周期、催化剂和下一观察点生成条件式内容。

presets.name: 内容 + 结算观点
presets.description: 先生成自然观点内容，再抽取并冻结一个可验证、可结算的一行主张。

presets.name: 观点卡
presets.description: 把创作者判断、统一观点图、可选交易协议和证据装成 Cuebook 原生观点卡。

presets.name: 三版直出
presets.description: 自动补充事实并一次生成三套短文案和静态观点图；仅在用户选择结算时附加同一结算提案。

presets.name: 交易复盘
presets.description: 使用授权和对账后的历史记录复盘过程、判断和失效条件。

presets.name: 纠错通知
presets.description: 失效旧工件后生成带来源、影响范围和传播计划的纠错。

presets.name: 今日主厨
presets.description: 从当前 Cuebook snapshot 自动提议多套配方，等待用户确认。
